title: About
text: Hello! I am Jacob (Jake). I am a Data Science student driven by a passion for analyzing data to improve performance and achieve goals within the sports industry. My experience as a Sales Intern at Hudl has provided me with the ability to extract insights from data mining and taught me technical tools like Salesforce and SalesLoft, while my time with Husker Athletics has honed my skills in customer service and collaborative project management. My background is built on attention to detail, teamwork, and the ability to adapt to new technologies. I am actively looking to apply my analytical, sports-focused, and personable skills to a professional sports organization, to contribute to its success and growth.
